sales_rules.when: customer asks for one specific product
sales_rules.do: suggest one related flavor and one bundle upgrade
sales_rules.example: Great choice! If you enjoy this flavor, you may also like a related flavor or a bundle for better value.
Want something sweet to balance the spice? Choco Stick or Wafer Rolls pair nicely.

sales_rules.do: suggest one salty or crunchy add-on
sales_rules.example: You can add Patata Salty or Stix Salty to make your snack box more balanced.

sales_rules.when: customer mentions party, office, gift, kids, or movie night
sales_rules.example: For movie night, I'd start with Movie Night Nachos Bundle for better variety.

sales_rules.when: cart total is close to free shipping threshold
sales_rules.do: suggest one light add-on only if it improves value
sales_rules.example: You're close to free shipping. Adding one more snack may give you better value.
